hook_3s: Think intimacy costs a fortune? Think again. This 7-day reset is free.
script_voiceover: Think intimacy costs a fortune? Think again. This 7-day reset is free. The Soft Life isn't just luxury; it's intentional connection. Day one: share a silent, candlelit meal. Day three: write a heartfelt note. Day five: spend an hour just holding hands, no distractions. These small, mindful acts deepen your bond without spending a dime. Ready to reclaim your connection? Share this and start tonight. True intimacy is built on presence, not price tags.
b_roll_shots: Hands gently placing a lit candle on a table (0-3s)
Soft fabric (silk scarf) being draped slowly (3-6s)
Close-up of hands holding a warm, elegant mug (glassware) (6-9s)
Hands slowly writing a note on beautiful paper (9-12s)
Two sets of hands clasped gently and mindfully (12-15s)
Close-up of a single candle flame flickering softly (15-18s)
Subtle light reflecting on a water glass or decanter (18-21s)
A hand slowly turning a page in a journal (21-24s)
cta: Ready to reclaim your connection? Share this and start tonight.
caption: Ready for a deeper connection without breaking the bank? This 7-day soft life intimacy reset focuses on mindful presence. [AIGC Label]
topic_seed: The soft life intimacy reset (7 days, no expense)
